overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the protagonist Geralt walking through a scenic rural landscape. The character travels from a grassy meadow path through a swampy water area and finally arrives at a traditional thatched-roof village on a bright summer day.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy meadow path through open countryside

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a winding dirt path surrounded by tall grass and scattered oak trees

entered.detail: winding dirt trail through the meadow
tall green and golden grass lining both sides of the path
dense cluster of oak and pine trees in the distance
large moss-covered boulder beside the path
rustic wooden fence marking a field boundary

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunlit dirt path through an open meadow. Tall grass sways on both sides while scattered trees dot the landscape. A large rock formation appears on the left as the path continues toward a distant forest.

events.description: encounters a woman in a green dress and children walking along the path
path becomes submerged in water entering a shallow swamp area

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path while passing pedestrians and approaching the water's edge

notable_agents.action: woman in a green dress walking along the path edge
small child in blue clothing standing near the water

entered.detail: shallow water beginning to cover the path

segments.scene_description: The path narrows as trees close in, creating dappled shade. The character passes a woman in a green dress and children walking in the opposite direction. The dirt path gradually becomes submerged in shallow water as the character enters a swampy area.

events.description: thatched-roof village becomes visible through the trees in the distance

agents.ego_description: wading through knee-deep swamp water surrounded by tall reeds and cattails

entered.detail: murky shallow water covering the ground with visible ripples
dense cattails and aquatic grasses growing in the water
cluster of traditional wooden houses with straw roofs visible through the trees

segments.scene_description: The character wades through a shallow swamp, water rippling with each step. Tall reeds and aquatic plants surround the path while trees create a canopy overhead. In the distance, a village with traditional thatched-roof houses becomes visible through the foliage.

scene_state.functional_zone: traditional village center with thatched cottages

events.description: exits the swamp onto dry land approaching the village outskirts
passes through a wooden gate structure marking the village entrance

agents.ego_description: walking into the village center, passing villagers and wooden structures

notable_agents.action: villager in red clothing bending down near a wooden cart
group of villagers gathered near the village well

entered.detail: rustic wooden archway with a hanging banner marking the village entrance
traditional log cabins with steep straw roofs and wooden shutters
wooden wagon with wheels parked beside a house
patches of bright orange flowers growing along the path
wooden well structure with a roof and villagers gathered around it

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the swamp onto dry ground and approaches a traditional village. Passing through a wooden gate, the scene opens into a village center with thatched-roof cottages, orange wildflowers, and villagers going about their daily activities near a wooden well.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open meadow through a shaded swamp and into a quaint rural village. It begins on a sunlit dirt path where tall grass sways beside a large rock formation, moving steadily toward a distant forest. As the trees close in to create dappled shade, the camera passes a woman and children before the dry path gradually submerges into a shallow, rippling swamp. The scene then shifts through a canopy of trees and thick reeds, with the foliage slowly parting to reveal thatched-roof houses in the distance. Finally, the camera emerges from the water onto dry ground and passes through a wooden gate, opening into a village center filled with orange wildflowers and residents gathered near a wooden well.
